lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- My Daily Routine
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 14 -- Daily Routine

listenings.text: Hi, I am Gabriela, and this is my daily routine. On weekdays I get up at seven o'clock. First I have a shower and I brush my teeth. Then I have breakfast at half past seven, with coffee and bread. I go to work at eight o'clock, and I work at the bank all morning. At noon I have lunch with my friends. I come home at six o'clock in the evening, and I have dinner at eight. After dinner I read a book, and I go to bed at eleven o'clock. I love my quiet evenings at home. What time do you go to bed?

Good morning, this is Daniel from the front desk with the daily office schedule. The doors open at seven o'clock. The morning meeting starts at nine, so please get to your desk before that. We have a coffee break at half past ten. Lunch is from twelve to one o'clock in the staff room. The afternoon meeting begins at three, and the office closes at six o'clock in the evening. Have a wonderful and productive day, everyone.

extra_audio.text: Gabriela gets up at seven o'clock in the morning. First she has a shower and brushes her teeth. Then she has breakfast and goes to work at eight. She comes home in the evening and has dinner with her family. Finally, she reads a book and goes to bed at eleven o'clock.
